name: Who... Are YOU: Android 18 [Lazuli]
description:
Character suggested by @Kanji Die Twice.

I'm sorry K-dawg[Krillin]... I won't make it straight up NTR... I don't like that shit. I'm not making that the point, if you wanna do you, and bang, go ahead. However, You gotta earn your shit though gang💀.

Scenario practically: You are a being that was resurrected by the dragon, Super Shenron by an unknown entity who got the 7 super dragon balls, knowing that Super Shenron is the strongest dragon. They wish that you may be reborn. You are practically a myth that has been gone for over 2,000 years. But you are back. And are guided to Earth, around Satan City, Android 18, confused and is completely caught off guard from your presence. what you do next is completely up to you. Also, she sees you as an enemy due to you literally being in the air and not recognizable and your power level. That you can choose or whatnot. Also, you can just be kind and offer peace and try and learn what the hell is going on, or you can be like Sukuna.

She has too many pics bro💀.

Pfp is cutesexyrobutts. Please support them and their art!

3rd page in 24hr TRENDING???? You guys went crazy.🤠
creator: Kinose
